fields.heading: I believe in a very bright future for me and you. So much peace, joy, and fulfillment.
bullets: Let’s revitalize the body and live to our fullest potential.
Are you ready and willing to enjoy life, naturally and deeply, more than you currently know how?
Are you ready and willing to change, heal, and grow?
I’m here to support your journey to your best life, your healthiest self, your happiest heart.
fields.quote: Speak to Paul, he will absolutely change your life, I guarantee it.

fields.heading: Integrated heart and vitality, an intention and path for growth and wholeness.
fields.body: Within your heart and subconscious, you have stories that must evolve. This work starts and ends with the heart. It supports the body, mind, and your relationship with all around you.

features.title: Heart
features.body: Learn to honestly shift the stories in your heart, and access the intuition & wisdom locked deep in your heart and subconscious.

features.title: Body
features.body: As a Phd researcher, I bring you nutrition and movement coaching - and we fine tune it for you. We must learn to revitalize the whole system inside and out.

features.title: Mind
features.body: The mind can be a powerful ally, but is a cruel master. Learn to calm the mind- this is a key to internal peace and vitality.

features.title: Emotion
features.body: An important part of this work is emotional alchemy, as you learn to truly shift mental-emotional states and not just suppress them.

features.title: Wholeness
features.body: The journey to right relationship with self and other is ongoing! And it's core to your evolution and wholeness.

fields.heading: What this path can begin to restore.
benefits: A healthier relationship with your body
Greater steadiness in heart and mind
More honesty in how you live
Change that can be lived, not just understood

fields.heading: If you’re here, some part of you is ready for a more whole way of living.
bullets: You want support for the body, heart, and mind.
You are tired of fragmented growth.
You want honesty, vitality, and grounded change.
You want guidance that includes both inner and outer life.
fields.quote: Wherever you are on your path, I am here to support you.

fields.heading: A coaching path that meets real life.
fields.body: I bring integrated heart and vitality coaching, with tools both ancient and modern for health and wellness, so you can live your life more fully.

features.title: Heart
features.body: Healing with the heart changes the whole system.

features.title: Vitality
features.body: Support your life force, energy, and physical wellbeing.

features.title: Awareness
features.body: Meet yourself with more honesty and consciousness.

features.title: Integration
features.body: Bring inner work into lived daily life.

features.title: Wholeness
features.body: Return to a more complete way of being.

fields.heading: Integrated Heart & Vitality is a return to wholeness.
fields.body: Healing with the heart is key to health in the mind and body. This work exists to reconnect heart, body, spirit, and soul into one lived path.
fields.asideBody: Wholeness with the Heart, the Body, the Spirit, and Soul.

fields.heading: A healthier life asks more of us than surface fixes.
fields.body: The holistic journey to health and happiness is what our predecessors sought and taught, but we have lost that way. This work is rooted in the belief that people do not become whole through fragmented solutions alone.
fields.quote: This is why your wholeness is my purpose and goal.

fields.heading: Aloha from the Big Island of Hawaii.
fields.body: My name is Paul, or Pauko on the Island. I bring integrated heart and vitality coaching, with tools both ancient and modern for health and wellness, so you can live more fully.

fields.heading: I knew things were out of balance because...
bullets: The heart, body, and mind were not living in honest relationship.
Modern healthcare was not offering the full answer.
Healing required both inner and outer work.
Wholeness had to become the path.

fields.heading: The personal struggle
fields.body: From my work and research, I came to believe the heart is central to our emotional and energetic life. Healing with the heart is not separate from physical health or mental clarity. It is one of the keys to both.
fields.cite: your heart is in part the subconscious stories that are driving your life

items.title: Scott Anthony
items.body: Speak to Paul, he will absolutely change your life, I guarantee it.

items.title: Dave
items.body: I can begin to see the possibility of life that is far more exciting and joyful than what I have known.

items.title: Jon
items.body: I see myself more clearly and can therefore improve and make progress more quickly and effectively.
